positive: A stylized minimalist scene depicting a friendly, stylized fox surrounded by blooming lavender and subtle crescent moon motifs. The composition should be centrally focused, with the fox in a whimsical, upright, joyful posture. Utilize a sophisticated two-tone color palette of deep indigo blue and creamy gold accents, accented by gentle blush pinks for the flowers. The artwork must have clean, thick silhouettes, resembling linework and dot work engraving techniques. The overall style should evoke vintage botanical etchings mixed with modern geometric simplicity, suitable for seamless textile printing. High contrast, vector-art quality, perfect print resolution.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, low detail, poor anatomy, dirty, extra limbs, noise, realistic photography, jpeg compression
